title: Federal Court Cyber Defense Modernization Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund zero-trust upgrades for federal courts, mandate incident tabletop exercises, and improve judicial branch cyber procurement standards.

title: Regional Freight Rail Capacity Act
bill_text: A BILL To expand freight rail sidings, modernize signaling, and reduce bottlenecks on major agricultural and manufacturing corridors.

title: Community Health Workforce Pipeline Act
bill_text: A BILL To provide grants for nursing preceptorships, primary care residencies, and community clinic staffing retention bonuses.

title: Wetlands and Estuary Recovery Act
bill_text: A BILL To restore degraded wetlands and estuaries through competitive grants and long-term habitat monitoring requirements.

title: Rural Broadband Deployment Coordination Act
bill_text: A BILL To coordinate federal broadband grants, speed pole attachment review, and prioritize unserved census blocks.

title: Apprenticeship Tax Incentive Modernization Act
bill_text: A BILL To expand tax incentives for registered apprenticeships and require outcomes reporting by participating employers.

title: Veterans Home Care Navigation Act
bill_text: A BILL To improve VA care navigation, caregiver training, and benefits counseling for aging veterans living at home.

title: School Mental Health Services Act
bill_text: A BILL To increase school-based counseling grants, tele-mental-health support, and crisis referral partnerships with local providers.

title: Grid Interconnection Queue Reform Act
bill_text: A BILL To require transparent grid interconnection timelines, standardized study requirements, and queue backlog reporting.

title: Federal Contract Fraud Analytics Act
bill_text: A BILL To deploy fraud analytics across procurement systems and require quarterly anomaly reporting to oversight committees.

title: Safe Drinking Water PFAS Response Act
bill_text: A BILL To accelerate PFAS remediation in public water systems and provide emergency filtration grants to affected communities.

title: Urban Bus Reliability Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund bus priority lanes, real-time dispatch upgrades, and preventative maintenance programs for urban transit agencies.
